action.reasoning: Observation: CUDA kernel error - PyTorch doesn't support this GPU architecture. Analysis: Need to check GPU type and potentially use CPU or reinstall PyTorch. Decision: Check GPU info first, then try CPU-based training with DLinear (simpler/faster model).
